body:
## Rationale

The `/battles` hub is sitemapped at priority 0.9. Issue #1407 (in queue) adds SSR meta title/description for this hub. But `/battles` will still have **zero JSON-LD schema** after #1407 ships — no CollectionPage, no ItemList, no FAQPage.

Adding schema to the hub unlocks:
- **AI Overview eligibility** (FAQPage → "Who are the best drummer battle matchups on MetalForge?")
- **Rich result potential** for the hub page CTR
- **Structured signal** that the page is a curated collection of matchups

This is an atomic add to the same SSR handler block that #1407 touches — it should be sequenced after #1407 merges.

## Files to touch

**`api/meta/[...path].js`** — in the `path === '/battles'` handler block, add `articleSchema`:

```js
articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@graph': [
    {
      '@type': 'CollectionPage',
      name: 'Metal Drummer Battles — Drum Kit Showdowns',
      description: 'Vote on the greatest drummer gear matchups in metal history. 8 curated battles across thrash, death, prog, and black metal.',
      url: `${BASE_URL}/battles`,
      hasPart: CURATED_MATCHUPS.map(m => ({
        '@type': 'WebPage',
        name: `${getD1Name(m)} vs ${getD2Name(m)}`,
        url: `${BASE_URL}/battles/${getBattleSlug(m)}`,
      })),
    },
    {
      '@type': 'FAQPage',
      mainEntity: [
        {
          '@type': 'Question',
          name: 'Who is the best metal drummer?',
          acceptedAnswer: { '@type': 'Answer', text: 'MetalForge lets fans vote on legendary matchups including Lars Ulrich vs Dave Lombardo, Gene Hoglan vs George Kollias, and more.' },
        },
        {
          '@type': 'Question',
          name: 'How do MetalForge drummer battles work?',
          acceptedAnswer: { '@type': 'Answer', text: 'Each week a new matchup is featured. Vote for your favorite, see the community results, and explore each drummer\'s full gear setup.' },
        },
      ],
    },
  ],
}),
```

Import `CURATED_MATCHUPS` and `getBattleSlug` from battles data file (already imported for #1407 if sequenced after).

## Sequencing note

Must merge AFTER #1407 (both touch the `/battles` handler block). Alternatively, can be bundled into #1407 to avoid the sequencing issue.

## Quality gate

- CollectionPage JSON-LD in SSR response for `/api/meta/battles`
- FAQPage with 2 Q&A entries
- `hasPart` array contains 8 WebPage items with correct URLs
- No duplicate JSON-LD blocks

## Estimated uplift

AI Overview eligibility for "best drummer battles", "lars ulrich vs dave lombardo drums" broad intent queries. Compound with #1473 (individual battle SSR) and #1476 (llms/battles/ markdown).

## Verify

1. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta/battles | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('articleSchema','MISSING')[:100])"` — should contain CollectionPage
2. FAQPage mainEntity has 2+ questions
3. `hasPart` array length = 8
4. Google Rich Results Test on metalforge.io/battles — FAQPage validates
5. No breakage of SSR meta title/description from #1407

## Done

`/battles` hub SSR response includes CollectionPage + FAQPage JSON-LD with correct `hasPart` array linking to all 8 battle pages.
title: SEO: /battles hub — add CollectionPage + FAQPage JSON-LD schema for AI Overview eligibility
